text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun has managed to leave a brilliant
mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've navigated our way through her
all-important first three years, and today, she's
her usual energetic self...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It's time for takeoff! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon! Why did Brian get first again?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. You've lost your edge.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Blegh, you're such a meanie! I want a rematch!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
No way. One will have to be enough. ☆ You're
racing against me next, Mayano. ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ah! That's right!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heh. Okay then, Marvey! Let's race! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting to hear you say that. ☆★

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...How childish.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Then what does that make you? You're the
one gettin' all worked up about beating Maya.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... Ama.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're no different. I saw you challenge her too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! The difference is I'm gonna win when I
take her on one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Right over your head...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Phew... ☆ I think that's all the partner running for
today...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You haven't run with me or Nature yet!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
No thank you. Count me out. I'll leave the running
to you youngsters...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're not fooling anyone! I can see that you're
practically shaking with excitement right now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Haha! ☆ Guess that means we have to race! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait, you guys—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. Hey, you. Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I guess her schedule's still packed, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...What are you so happy about? She's the one
who asked to race me again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Whatever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm tired today anyway. Tell her I want the first
match tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph... I look forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What's going on?! Trainer, are you cheating on
me?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's enough running! It's time to go on a
date!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't you "huh" me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm done with partner running, and I've already
finished all my other plans for today.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It'll be a quick one. Just put me in a good mood!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay! Love ya, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Let's meet at the school gates in ten minutes! Do
you copy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, Mayano Top Gun and I go on a date...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Haha! We're just in time! Nice!
choice_data_list: I didn't think we'd be out this late...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. ☆ It's nice every once in a while!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Especially now that I've grown up a little!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Are you sure you didn't mean to say "a
lot"?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. What am I gonna do with you? But it's
okay 'cause...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna become an even more twinkly
grown-up lady!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: This is definitely where I twinkle the most.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Everyone runs their hearts out—and sure, I
might lose to them sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But it's the most fun I've ever had! It's so exciting
and makes my heart pound!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's moments like these that make me really feel
like I'm twinkly!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yep! So...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I want you to help me sparkle even more brightly
from now on!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And, y'know... I still have a lot of stuff I wanna do!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Like going on a beach date or visiting an
amusement park at night!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And I wanna run in all the different races I haven't
experienced yet!
choice_data_list: You can do anything you put your mind to.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I agree! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: After all, I have you by my side!
